title: 3 Phase Energy Meter Price in Pakistan 2026 — Digital, Smart & DIN Rail Complete Buyer Guide

summary_html: Complete 3-phase energy meter buying guide for Pakistan 2026. IEC 62053-21/22 accuracy classes explained (Class 2/1/0.5S), four meter types compared (digital/multi-function/smart AMI/bi-directional), CT ratio selection formula, NEPRA net metering check meter requirements, full PKR price matrix Rs 2,800–Rs 65,000, and 5 costly mistakes to avoid.
